name: Leucovorin + Methyl-B12 + Sulforaphane
description: No published RCT of the triple. Each component has positive RCT individually. Anecdotal reports (ANE-0010) suggest synergistic effect. High priority for first-class combo investigation.
rationale: Targets cerebral folate deficiency (leucovorin), methylation cycle (B12), and oxidative stress / NRF2 (sulforaphane) simultaneously — three independent mechanisms commonly co-occurring in autism phenotypes.
interaction_warnings: Generally safe; monitor for excess methylation symptoms in COMT++ children.

name: Methylated folate + Choline + Omega-3 (preconception/prenatal)
description: Strong individual-component evidence; combo not yet RCT-tested as such; biological rationale strong.
rationale: Methylation substrate stack covering folate (5-MTHF), choline (methyl donor), and DHA/EPA (membrane integrity + neuroinflammation). Each reduces autism risk individually in cohort data.
interaction_warnings: None significant; standard prenatal vitamin caveats.

name: GFCF diet + L-glutamine + Probiotics (gut-axis combo)
description: Mixed individual evidence; combo not RCT-tested; strong anecdotal endorsement.
rationale: Gluten-free + casein-free diet + intestinal permeability repair + microbiome modulation; targets the gut-brain axis hypothesis as an integrated stack.
interaction_warnings: None significant; ensure adequate calcium/D if GFCF.

name: Reverse-osmosis water + Organic produce + Glass storage (environmental remediation combo)
description: Mechanistic rationale strong; individual components evidence-supported; combo as risk-reduction strategy.
rationale: Reduces total body burden of PFAS, glyphosate, phthalates, and BPA — three independently-documented endocrine disruptors and neurotoxicants implicated in autism risk.
